seoTitle: Mount Magnet vs Mount Melville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Magnet and Mount Melville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Magnet vs Mount Melville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Magnet and Mount Melville.
heading: Mount Magnet vs Mount Melville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Magnet, Western Australia and Mount Melville, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Magnet has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Mount Melville (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Magnet or Mount Melville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Magnet has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Mount Melville scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Magnet scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Melville scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Magnet or Mount Melville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Magnet has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
